summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bus Staff Configuration feature. All backend APIs pass (14/14 tests). Frontend CRUD operations work correctly. InfoWindow displays staff info. Download buttons work.
critical_code_review_comments: Bus Staff Configuration feature is fully functional
All CRUD operations work correctly via API and UI
InfoWindow correctly displays Driver and Counselor names for configured buses
Download Seat Availability CSV includes staff information
Download Bus Assignments CSV works correctly
seed_data_creation: Bus #01 has pre-configured staff (John Smith/Jane Doe)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bus Staff Configuration feature is complete and working. Backend tests in /app/tests/test_bus_staff_api.py cover all CRUD operations. Bus #01 has staff configured (John Smith/Jane Doe). Frontend uses shadcn/ui dialogs and sonner toasts.

features_tested.bus_staff_dialog: PASS - Opens correctly when clicking 'Configure Bus Staff' button
features_tested.bus_staff_create: PASS - Can select bus, enter driver/counselor/address/location/capacity and save
features_tested.bus_staff_read: PASS - Configured buses appear in 'Configured Buses' list with correct info
features_tested.bus_staff_update: PASS - Edit button loads existing config, changes can be saved
features_tested.bus_staff_delete: PASS - Delete button removes configuration (requires confirm dialog)
features_tested.infowindow_staff_display: PASS - Clicking camper marker shows Driver and Counselor names
features_tested.download_seat_availability: PASS - Downloads CSV with staff info (Driver, Counselor columns)
features_tested.download_bus_assignments: PASS - Downloads CSV with camper assignments
features_tested.backend_get_all_staff: PASS - GET /api/bus-staff returns all configured staff
